title: Campus Mobility Map
description: A quick explorable map prototype for commuting patterns around Cambridge.

title: Housing Affordability Explorer
description: Small multiples for rent burden and income bands, with filters for neighborhood.

title: Real Estate Carbon Budget Dashboard
description: A simple view comparing operational vs embodied emissions under retrofit scenarios.

title: Transit Catchment Story Map
description: A narrative map showing walk sheds and transfer friction across key stations.

title: Solar Potential Quick Look
description: A lightweight calculator to sanity-check rooftop PV capacity by building type.

title: Retail Footfall Heatmap
description: Weekday vs weekend foot traffic patterns for a corridor, grouped by hour.

title: Zoning Change Timeline
description: A clean timeline of rezoning events, with quick links to the underlying documents.

title: Flood Risk Parcel Viewer
description: Parcel-level lookup for flood zones and elevation, built for fast "what if" checks.

title: Construction Cost Sensitivity Tool
description: A small sensitivity grid for hard-cost inflation, interest rates, and stabilized NOI.

title: Data Center Load Monitor
description: Sketch of an interface to track interconnection requests and projected MW demand.

title: Noise Complaints Analyzer
description: A quick pass at cleaning and summarizing complaint text by topic and geography.

title: Street Tree Equity Audit
description: A simple comparison of canopy coverage vs heat exposure across census tracts.
